name: UrbanMind AI
description: Developed for a four-hour hackathon, the project uses a Python FastAPI backend for high-velocity, asynchronous I/O and a sleek React + Tailwind CSS frontend. The intelligence layer relies on Google Gemini 1.5 Flash to perform low-latency, multimodal vision analysis on citizen-uploaded images, automatically classifying the issue (using an Open311 standard) and assigning a severity score. This structured data is instantly displayed on a dark-mode React-Leaflet map, creating a visually compelling "Control Room" aesthetic that highlights city hotspots for immediate action.
